tasks.description: Capture pre-upgrade baseline: run npm run build, type-check, lint, and test. Record all outputs in .swarm/evidence/upgrade-baseline/
tasks.acceptance: Baseline captured with build, type-check, lint, and 144 tests all passing

tasks.description: Create git branch for upgrade work. Run npm audit and pin current package-lock.json as rollback reference.
tasks.acceptance: Branch created, audit recorded, lockfile preserved

tasks.description: Upgrade core dependencies: update package.json with next@^15, react@^19, react-dom@^19, @types/react@^19, @types/react-dom@^19, eslint-config-next@^15. Run npm install.
tasks.acceptance: Dependencies upgraded, npm install completes cleanly

tasks.description: Run @next/codemod on src/app/ directory transforms. Then run on src/components/ and src/lib/. Review each codemod output file for correctness before committing.
tasks.acceptance: Codemod transforms applied and reviewed across all directories

tasks.description: Update Supabase SSR integration: verify @supabase/ssr version, update cookie handling in src/lib/supabase/client.ts, server.ts, middleware.ts. Fix middleware.ts edge runtime patterns for Next.js 15.
tasks.acceptance: Supabase auth works end-to-end, middleware redirects correctly, type-check passes

tasks.description: Fix React 19: update useEffect cleanup patterns, forwardRef usage, and children prop types across hooks/ (10 files), lib/ (40 files), and store/ (2 files).
tasks.acceptance: All hooks and lib files compile with React 19 types

tasks.description: Fix React 19: update components/ directory — avatar, boss, combat, dashboard, games, hud, play, player, qf, quests, shop, story, ui component patterns for React 19 breaking changes.
tasks.acceptance: All 60+ components compile with React 19, build passes

tasks.description: Fix React 19: update app/ route pages and server action files. Fix any dynamic/static export changes.
tasks.acceptance: All 42 routes render without hydration errors

tasks.description: Update existing test files (14 files) for React 19 compatibility: fix act() wrapping, cleanup patterns, type changes.
Full QA pass on Next.js 15: npm run build, type-check, lint, test all pass. Verify no high-severity npm audit findings.
tasks.acceptance: All gates pass. Committed as discrete checkpoint.

tasks.description: Upgrade next@^16 and eslint-config-next@^16. Run npm install. Run @next/codemod for 15-to-16 transforms.
Update build config for Turbopack: verify next.config.mjs images.remotePatterns, async headers(), reactStrictMode work. Fix any PostCSS/Tailwind pipeline issues.
Fix Next.js 16 specific issues: edge middleware cookie API changes, server component rendering differences, and any remaining API deprecations.
tasks.acceptance: Build, type-check, and tests all pass

tasks.description: Update test files if any Next.js 16 related changes needed. Run full test suite.
Full QA pass on Next.js 16: build, type-check, lint, tests. Run npm audit to confirm 0 high-severity vulns.
Manual smoke test: load login, signup, dashboard (all sub-routes), play (all sub-routes). Check for console errors, hydration mismatches, and auth flow (login as GM, login as player, logout).
tasks.acceptance: All routes load without console errors. Auth flows work end-to-end.

tasks.description: Run regression sweep with test_runner scope:impact on changed auth, middleware, and layout files. Run full test suite one final time.
tasks.acceptance: Full test suite passes. No regressions.
